creator: matthias+freebsd+bugzilla@harz.de
text:
More info:

epairXa is on host, member of a bridge.
epairXb is in jail.

Setup works for some days (~3) then stops.

tcpdump on epairXa and epairXb shows:

Traffic epairXa -> epairXb get through
Traffic epairXb -> epairXa does NOT get through

inside jail
tcpdump on epairXb shows traffic going out.
systat -ifstat shows 0 traffic going out. 

ifconfig down/up both epairs does not fix the issue.

only 1 of 7 jails is hit by this bug ( random? )
running a nameserver (bind)
the only jail with high UDP traffic.
